description_long: This is a heavily armored, futuristic combat tactical vehicle equipped with dual large-caliber cannons mounted on a central rotating turret. The vehicle features a low, wide chassis with reinforced tracks for enhanced mobility over rough terrain, and its exterior is covered in angular, sloped armor panels for increased protection. The turret is fitted with advanced optics and sensor equipment, including a prominent periscope and antenna, suggesting sophisticated targeting and communication capabilities. The hull displays a complex camouflage paint scheme with a mix of earthy browns, greens, and reds, blending into urban or mixed environments. The vehicle's sides reveal robust suspension systems and multiple road wheels, indicating a design optimized for both durability and maneuverability. No visible military insignia or unit markings are present, and the vehicle lacks traditional tires, relying instead on continuous tracks for movement.
description: A futuristic, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with dual cannons, advanced sensors, and a complex camouflage paint scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing dual cannons, sloped armor, and central turret with advanced optics.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the tracks, suspension system, and turret profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back armor, turret base, and track width.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing track details and turret structure.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two large-caliber cannon mounts on the central turret, both forward-facing; additional sensor and antenna mounts on turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating; reinforced panels on the front, sides, and turret; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Complex camouflage pattern with blended brown, green, red, and gray colors in irregular, streaked shapes.
